revision.text:
{{神社 |名称=宇母理比古神社 |所在地=徳島県徳島市八多町森時41 |祭神=鵜鷲守神 |社格=式内社
村社 |創建=創祀年代不詳 |例祭= |神事= }} '''宇母理比古神社'''（うもりひこじんじゃ）は、[[徳島県]][[徳島市]]八多町に鎮座する神社である。 == ご祭神 == * [[鵜鷲守神]] - 鵜草葺不合命の別名ともいう。 == 歴史 == :創祀年代は不詳である。[[延喜式]][[式内社]]である。宇母理大明神、森時大明神とも呼ばれた古社。近くを流れる八多川の氾濫により、社殿や古文書等ことごとく失われた。[[明治]]8年に[[村社]]に列した。 == 関連項目 == * [[神道]] * [[神社]] {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:うもりひこしんしや}} [[Category:徳島県の神社]] [[Category:式内小社]] [[Category:村社]] [[Category:徳島市]]

revision.comment: 座標追加
revision.text:
{{神社 |名称 = 宇母理比古神社 |画像 = [[画像:Gazoubosyu.jpg]] |所在地 = 徳島県徳島市八多町森時41 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|33|59|22.8|N|134|30|53.1|E|scale:25000}} |祭神 = 鵜鷲守神 |社格 = 式内小社・旧村社 |創建 = 不明 |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 10月2日 |神事 = }}
'''宇母理比古神社'''（うもりひこじんじゃ）は、[[徳島県]][[徳島市]]八多町に鎮座する神社である。
== 祭神 == * '''鵜鷲守神''' - [[鵜草葺不合命]]の別名ともいう。
== 歴史 == 創祀年代は不詳である。[[延喜式内社]]である。「宇母理大明神」、「森時大明神」とも呼ばれた古社。近くを流れる[[八多川 (徳島県)|八多川]]の氾濫により、社殿や古文書等ことごとく失われた。[[明治]]8年（[[1875年]]）に[[村社]]に列した。
{{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:うもりひこしんしや}} [[Category:徳島市の神社]] [[Category:式内小社]] [[Category:村社]]

{{神社 |名称 = 宇母理比古神社 |画像 = [[画像:Gazoubosyu.jpg]] |所在地 = 徳島県徳島市八多町森時41 |位置 = {{ウィキ座標2段度分秒|33|59|22.8|N|134|30|53.1|E|scale:25000}} |祭神 = 鵜鷲守神 |社格 = 式内小社・旧村社 |創建 = 不明 |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 10月2日 |神事 = }}

== 祭神 == * '''鵜鷲守神''' - [[鵜草葺不合命]]の別名ともいう。
== 歴史 == 創祀年代は不詳である。[[延喜式内社]]である。「宇母理大明神」、「森時大明神」とも呼ばれた古社。近くを流れる[[八多川 (徳島県)|八多川]]の氾濫により、社殿や古文書等ことごとく失われた。[[明治]]8年（[[1875年]]）に[[村社]]に列した。
{{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:うもりひこしんしや}} [[Category:徳島市の神社]] [[Category:式内小社]] [[Category:村社]]

{{nihongo|'''Umorihiko Shrine'''|宇母理比古神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

{{nihongo|'''Umorihiko Shrine'''|宇母理比古神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

{{nihongo|'''Umorihiko Shrine'''|宇母理比古神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

{{nihongo|'''Umorihiko Shrine'''|宇母理比古神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

{{nihongo|'''Umorihiko Shrine'''|宇母理比古神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

{{nihongo|'''Umorihiko Shrine'''|宇母理比古神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

{{nihongo|'''Umorihiko Shrine'''|宇母理比古神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

{{nihongo|'''Umorihiko Shrine'''|宇母理比古神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

{{nihongo|'''Umorihiko Shrine'''|宇母理比古神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

{{nihongo|'''Umorihiko Shrine'''|宇母理比古神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

{{Infobox religious building | name = Umorihiko Shrine | native_name = 宇母理比古神社 | image = Umorihiko shrine, Tokushima.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Umorihiko Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|33.990087|134.515131}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Umorihiko Shrine'''|宇母理比古神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

{{nihongo|'''Umorihiko Shrine'''|宇母理比古神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

{{nihongo|'''Umorihiko Shrine'''|宇母理比古神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

history}}[[Category:Automerged Japanese text]] == Japanese Wikipedia content == {{出典の明記| date = 2025年1月}}{{神社 |名称 = 宇母理比古神社 |画像 = [[File:Umorihiko shrine, Tokushima.jpg|250px|宇母理比古神社]] |所在地 = [[徳島県]][[徳島市]]八多町森時41 |位置 = {{Coord|33|59|22.8|N|134|30|53.1|E|region:JP-36_type:landmark_scale:25000|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = 鵜鷲守神 |社格 = [[式内小社]]・旧[[村社]] |創建 = 不明 |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 10月2日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=宇母理
比古神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''宇母理比古神社'''（うもりひこじんじゃ）は、[[徳島県]][[徳島市]][[八多町]]に鎮座する神社である。 == 祭神 == * '''鵜鷲守神''' - [[鵜葺草葺不合命]]の別名ともいう。 == 歴史 == 創祀年代は不詳である。[[延喜式内社]]である。「宇母理大明神」、「森時大明神」とも呼ばれた古社。近くを流れる[[八多川 (徳島県)|八多川]]の氾濫により、社殿や古文書等ことごとく失われた。[[明治]]8年（[[1875年]]）に[[村社]]に列した。 == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:うもりひこしんしや}} [[Category:徳島市の神社]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:徳島県の旧村社]] ==End Japanese==

history}}[[Category:Automerged Japanese text]] == Japanese Wikipedia content == {{出典の明記| date = 2025年1月}}{{神社 |名称 = 宇母理比古神社 |画像 = [[File:Umorihiko shrine, Tokushima.jpg|250px|宇母理比古神社]] |所在地 = {{jalink|徳島県|Q160734}}{{jalink|徳島市|Q207309}}八多町森時41 |位置 = {{Coord|33|59|22.8|N|134|30|53.1|E|region:JP-36_type:landmark_scale:25000|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = 鵜鷲守神 |社格 = {{jalink|式内小社|Q134917287}}・旧{{jalink|村社}} |創建 = 不明 |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 10月2日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=宇母理
比古神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''宇母理比古神社'''（うもりひこじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|徳島県|Q160734}}{{jalink|徳島市|Q207309}}{{jalink|八多町|Q11390732}}に鎮座する神社である。 == 祭神 == * '''鵜鷲守神''' - {{jalink|鵜葺草葺不合命}}の別名ともいう。 == 歴史 == 創祀年代は不詳である。{{jalink|延喜式内社}}である。「宇母理大明神」、「森時大明神」とも呼ばれた古社。近くを流れる{{jalink|八多川 (徳島県)|Q11390730|八多川}}の氾濫により、社殿や古文書等ことごとく失われた。{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}8年（{{jalink|1875年|Q7764}}）に{{jalink|村社}}に列した。 == 脚注 == {{Reflist}} {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} ==End Japanese== [[Category:徳島市の神社]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:徳島県の旧村社]]

{{nihongo|'''Umorihiko Shrine'''|宇母理比古神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]].

name in kana (P1814) == * うもりひこじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 3480005000911 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '徳島県徳島市八多町森時41', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:宇母理比古神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11449442}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記| date = 2025年1月}}{{神社 |名称 = 宇母理比古神社 |画像 = [[File:Umorihiko shrine, Tokushima.jpg|250px|宇母理比古神社]] |所在地 = {{jalink|徳島県|Q160734}}{{jalink|徳島市|Q207309}}八多町森時41 |位置 = {{Coord|33|59|22.8|N|134|30|53.1|E|region:JP-36_type:landmark_scale:25000|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = 鵜鷲守神 |社格 = {{jalink|式内小社|Q134917287}}・旧{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}} |創建 = 不明 |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 10月2日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=宇母理
比古神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''宇母理比古神社'''（うもりひこじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|徳島県|Q160734}}{{jalink|徳島市|Q207309}}{{jalink|八多町|Q11390732}}に鎮座する神社である。 === 祭神 === * '''鵜鷲守神''' - {{jalink|鵜葺草葺不合命}}の別名ともいう。 === 歴史 === 創祀年代は不詳である。{{jalink|延喜式内社}}である。「宇母理大明神」、「森時大明神」とも呼ばれた古社。近くを流れる{{jalink|八多川 (徳島県)|Q11390730|八多川}}の氾濫により、社殿や古文書等ことごとく失われた。{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}8年（{{jalink|1875年|Q7764}}）に{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}に列した。 === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:うもりひこしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:徳島市の神社]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:徳島県の旧村社]]

{{jalink|徳島県|Q160734}}{{jalink|徳島市|Q207309}}八多町森時41 |位置 = {{Coord|33|59|22.8|N|134|30|53.1|E|region:JP-36_type:landmark_scale:25000|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = 鵜鷲守神 |社格 = {{jalink|式内小社|Q134917287}}・旧{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}} |創建 = 不明 |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 10月2日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=宇母理
比古神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''宇母理比古神社'''（うもりひこじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|徳島県|Q160734}}{{jalink|徳島市|Q207309}}{{jalink|八多町|Q11390732}}に鎮座する神社である。 === 祭神 === * '''鵜鷲守神''' - {{jalink|鵜葺草葺不合命}}の別名ともいう。 === 歴史 === 創祀年代は不詳である。{{jalink|延喜式内社}}である。「宇母理大明神」、「森時大明神」とも呼ばれた古社。近くを流れる{{jalink|八多川 (徳島県)|Q11390730|八多川}}の氾濫により、社殿や古文書等ことごとく失われた。{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}8年（{{jalink|1875年|Q7764}}）に{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}に列した。 === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:うもりひこしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Autogenerated pages with jawiki interwikis, possibly accidentally overwritten]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:徳島市の神社]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:徳島県の旧村社]] [[Category:need translation]]

比古神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''宇母理比古神社'''（うもりひこじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|徳島県|Q160734}}{{jalink|徳島市|Q207309}}{{jalink|八多町|Q11390732}}に鎮座する神社である。 === 祭神 === * '''鵜鷲守神''' - {{jalink|鵜葺草葺不合命}}の別名ともいう。 === 歴史 === 創祀年代は不詳である。{{jalink|延喜式内社}}である。「宇母理大明神」、「森時大明神」とも呼ばれた古社。近くを流れる{{jalink|八多川 (徳島県)|Q11390730|八多川}}の氾濫により、社殿や古文書等ことごとく失われた。{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}8年（{{jalink|1875年|Q7764}}）に{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}に列した。 === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:うもりひこしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:徳島市の神社]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:徳島県の旧村社]] [[Category:need translation]]

name in kana (P1814) == * うもりひこじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 3480005000911 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '徳島県徳島市八多町森時41', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:宇母理比古神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11449442}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記| date = 2025年1月}}{{神社 |名称 = 宇母理比古神社 |画像 = [[File:Umorihiko shrine, Tokushima.jpg|250px|宇母理比古神社]] |所在地 = {{jalink|徳島県|Q160734}}{{jalink|徳島市|Q207309}}八多町森時41 |位置 = {{Coord|33|59|22.8|N|134|30|53.1|E|region:JP-36_type:landmark_scale:25000|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = 鵜鷲守神 |社格 = {{jalink|式内小社|Q134917287}}・旧{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}} |創建 = 不明 |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 10月2日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=宇母理
比古神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''宇母理比古神社'''（うもりひこじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|徳島県|Q160734}}{{jalink|徳島市|Q207309}}{{jalink|八多町|Q11390732}}に鎮座する神社である。 === 祭神 === * '''鵜鷲守神''' - {{jalink|鵜葺草葺不合命}}の別名ともいう。 === 歴史 === 創祀年代は不詳である。{{jalink|延喜式内社}}である。「宇母理大明神」、「森時大明神」とも呼ばれた古社。近くを流れる{{jalink|八多川 (徳島県)|Q11390730|八多川}}の氾濫により、社殿や古文書等ことごとく失われた。{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}8年（{{jalink|1875年|Q7764}}）に{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}に列した。 === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:うもりひこしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Umorihiko Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Umorihiko Shrine]][[Category:Pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:徳島市の神社]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:徳島県の旧村社]] [[Category:need translation]]

link|Q11449442}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記| date = 2025年1月}}{{神社 |名称 = 宇母理比古神社 |画像 = [[File:Umorihiko shrine, Tokushima.jpg|250px|宇母理比古神社]] |所在地 = {{jalink|徳島県|Q160734}}{{jalink|徳島市|Q207309}}八多町森時41 |位置 = {{Coord|33|59|22.8|N|134|30|53.1|E|region:JP-36_type:landmark_scale:25000|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = 鵜鷲守神 |社格 = {{jalink|式内小社|Q134917287}}・旧{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}} |創建 = 不明 |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = 10月2日 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=宇母理
比古神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''宇母理比古神社'''（うもりひこじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|徳島県|Q160734}}{{jalink|徳島市|Q207309}}{{jalink|八多町|Q11390732}}に鎮座する神社である。 === 祭神 === * '''鵜鷲守神''' - {{jalink|鵜葺草葺不合命}}の別名ともいう。 === 歴史 === 創祀年代は不詳である。{{jalink|延喜式内社}}である。「宇母理大明神」、「森時大明神」とも呼ばれた古社。近くを流れる{{jalink|八多川 (徳島県)|Q11390730|八多川}}の氾濫により、社殿や古文書等ことごとく失われた。{{jalink|明治|Q3125096}}8年（{{jalink|1875年|Q7764}}）に{{jalink|村社|Q134917284}}に列した。 === 脚注 === {{Reflist}} {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:うもりひこしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Umorihiko Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Umorihiko Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:徳島市の神社]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:徳島県の旧村社]] [[Category:need translation]]

比古神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Umorihiko Shrine''' (うもりひこじんじゃ) is a shrine located in {{jalink|Hatta-chō|Q11390732}}, {{jalink|Tokushima|Q207309}}, {{jalink|Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734}}. === Enshrined deity === * '''Uganomori no Kami''' - also said to be another name for {{jalink|Ugayafukiaezu no Mikoto}}. === History === The founding date is unknown. It is an {{jalink|Engishiki shrine}}. This old shrine was also called "Umori Daimyōjin" and "Moritoki Daimyōjin." Flooding of the nearby {{jalink|Hatta River (Tokushima Prefecture)|Q11390730|Hatta River}} caused the loss of the shrine buildings and old documents. In 1875 (Meiji 8), it was ranked as a {{jalink|village shrine|Q134917284}}. === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:うもりひこしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Umorihiko Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Umorihiko Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:徳島市の神社]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:徳島県の旧村社]] [[Category:need translation]]

Prefecture|Q160734}}{{jalink|Tokushima|Q207309}} Hatta-chō Moritoki 41 |位置 = {{Coord|33|59|22.8|N|134|30|53.1|E|region:JP-36_type:landmark_scale:25000|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Uganomori no Kami |社格 = {{jalink|Shikinai Shōsha|Q134917287}}・former {{jalink|village shrine|Q134917284}} |創建 = unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = October 2 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=宇母理
比古神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Umorihiko Shrine''' (うもりひこじんじゃ) is a shrine located in {{jalink|Hatta-chō|Q11390732}}, {{jalink|Tokushima|Q207309}}, {{jalink|Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734}}. === Enshrined deity === * '''Uganomori no Kami''' - also said to be another name for {{jalink|Ugayafukiaezu no Mikoto}}. === History === The founding date is unknown. It is an {{jalink|Engishiki shrine}}. This old shrine was also called "Umori Daimyōjin" and "Moritoki Daimyōjin." Flooding of the nearby {{jalink|Hatta River (Tokushima Prefecture)|Q11390730|Hatta River}} caused the loss of the shrine buildings and old documents. In 1875 (Meiji 8), it was ranked as a {{jalink|village shrine|Q134917284}}. === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:うもりひこしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Umorihiko Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Umorihiko Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:徳島市の神社]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:徳島県の旧村社]]

link|Q11449442}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記| date = 2025年1月}}{{神社 |名称 = Umorihiko Shrine |画像 = [[File:Umorihiko shrine, Tokushima.jpg|250px|Umorihiko Shrine]] |所在地 = {{jalink|Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734}}{{jalink|Tokushima|Q207309}} Hatta-chō Moritoki 41 |位置 = {{Coord|33|59|22.8|N|134|30|53.1|E|region:JP-36_type:landmark_scale:25000|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Uganomori no Kami |社格 = {{jalink|Shikinai Shōsha|Q134917287}}・former {{jalink|village shrine|Q134917284}} |創建 = unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = October 2 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=宇母理
比古神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Umorihiko Shrine''' (うもりひこじんじゃ) is a shrine located in {{jalink|Hatta-chō|Q11390732}}, {{jalink|Tokushima|Q207309}}, {{jalink|Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734}}. === Enshrined deity === * '''Uganomori no Kami''' - also said to be another name for {{jalink|Ugayafukiaezu no Mikoto}}. === History === The founding date is unknown. It is an {{jalink|Engishiki shrine}}. This old shrine was also called "Umori Daimyōjin" and "Moritoki Daimyōjin." Flooding of the nearby {{jalink|Hatta River (Tokushima Prefecture)|Q11390730|Hatta River}} caused the loss of the shrine buildings and old documents. In 1875 (Meiji 8), it was ranked as a {{jalink|village shrine|Q134917284}}. === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:うもりひこしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Umorihiko Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Umorihiko Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:徳島市の神社]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:徳島県の旧村社]][[Category:qq]]

|社格 = {{jalink|Shikinai Shōsha|Q134917287}}・former {{jalink|village shrine|Q134917284}} |創建 = unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = October 2 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=宇母理
比古神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Umorihiko Shrine''' (うもりひこじんじゃ) is a shrine located in {{jalink|Hatta-chō|Q11390732}}, {{jalink|Tokushima|Q207309}}, {{jalink|Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734}}. === Enshrined deity === * '''Uganomori no Kami''' - also said to be another name for {{jalink|Ugayafukiaezu no Mikoto}}. === History === The founding date is unknown. It is an {{jalink|Engishiki shrine}}. This old shrine was also called "Umori Daimyōjin" and "Moritoki Daimyōjin." Flooding of the nearby {{jalink|Hatta River (Tokushima Prefecture)|Q11390730|Hatta River}} caused the loss of the shrine buildings and old documents. In 1875 (Meiji 8), it was ranked as a {{jalink|village shrine|Q134917284}}. === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:うもりひこしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Umorihiko Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Umorihiko Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:徳島市の神社]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:徳島県の旧村社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]]

link|Q11449442}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記| date = 2025年1月}}{{神社 |名称 = Umorihiko Shrine |画像 = [[File:Umorihiko shrine, Tokushima.jpg|250px|Umorihiko Shrine]] |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|WD=Q160734}}{{ill|lt=Tokushima|Q207309|WD=Q207309}} Hatta-chō Moritoki 41 |位置 = {{Coord|33|59|22.8|N|134|30|53.1|E|region:JP-36_type:landmark_scale:25000|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Uganomori no Kami |社格 = {{ill|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|Q134917287|WD=Q134917287}}・former {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}} |創建 = unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = October 2 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=宇母理
比古神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Umorihiko Shrine''' (うもりひこじんじゃ) is a shrine located in {{ill|lt=Hatta-chō|Q11390732|WD=Q11390732}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima|Q207309|WD=Q207309}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|WD=Q160734}}. === Enshrined deity === * '''Uganomori no Kami''' - also said to be another name for {{ill||lt=Ugayafukiaezu no Mikoto|UNKNOWN}}. === History === The founding date is unknown. It is an {{ill||lt=Engishiki shrine|UNKNOWN}}. This old shrine was also called "Umori Daimyōjin" and "Moritoki Daimyōjin." Flooding of the nearby {{ill|lt=Hatta River (Tokushima Prefecture)|Q11390730|WD=Q11390730|lt=Hatta River}} caused the loss of the shrine buildings and old documents. In 1875 (Meiji 8), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}}. === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:うもりひこしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Umorihiko Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Umorihiko Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:徳島市の神社]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:徳島県の旧村社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

link|Q11449442}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記| date = 2025年1月}}{{神社 |名称 = Umorihiko Shrine |画像 = [[File:Umorihiko shrine, Tokushima.jpg|250px|Umorihiko Shrine]] |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|WD=Q160734}}{{ill|lt=Tokushima|Q207309|WD=Q207309}} Hatta-chō Moritoki 41 |位置 = {{Coord|33|59|22.8|N|134|30|53.1|E|region:JP-36_type:landmark_scale:25000|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Uganomori no Kami |社格 = {{ill|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|Q134917287|WD=Q134917287}}・former {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}} |創建 = unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = October 2 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=宇母理
比古神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Umorihiko Shrine''' (うもりひこじんじゃ) is a shrine located in {{ill|lt=Hatta-chō|Q11390732|WD=Q11390732}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima|Q207309|WD=Q207309}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|WD=Q160734}}. === Enshrined deity === * '''Uganomori no Kami''' - also said to be another name for {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ugayafukiaezu no Mikoto|UNKNOWN}}. === History === The founding date is unknown. It is an {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Engishiki shrine|UNKNOWN}}. This old shrine was also called "Umori Daimyōjin" and "Moritoki Daimyōjin." Flooding of the nearby {{ill|lt=Hatta River (Tokushima Prefecture)|Q11390730|WD=Q11390730|lt=Hatta River}} caused the loss of the shrine buildings and old documents. In 1875 (Meiji 8), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}}. === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:うもりひこしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Umorihiko Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Umorihiko Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:徳島市の神社]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:徳島県の旧村社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

{{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=宇母理
比古神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Umorihiko Shrine''' (うもりひこじんじゃ) is a shrine located in {{ill|lt=Hatta-chō|Q11390732|WD=Q11390732}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima|Q207309|WD=Q207309}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|WD=Q160734}}. === Enshrined deity === * '''Uganomori no Kami''' - also said to be another name for {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ugayafukiaezu no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}. === History === The founding date is unknown. It is an {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Engishiki shrine|1=UNKNOWN}}. This old shrine was also called "Umori Daimyōjin" and "Moritoki Daimyōjin." Flooding of the nearby {{ill|lt=Hatta River (Tokushima Prefecture)|Q11390730|WD=Q11390730|lt=Hatta River}} caused the loss of the shrine buildings and old documents. In 1875 (Meiji 8), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}}. === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:うもりひこしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Umorihiko Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Umorihiko Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:徳島市の神社]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:徳島県の旧村社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

link|Q11449442}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記| date = 2025年1月}}{{神社 |名称 = Umorihiko Shrine |画像 = [[File:Umorihiko shrine, Tokushima.jpg|250px|Umorihiko Shrine]] |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|WD=Q160734}}{{ill|lt=Tokushima|Q207309|WD=Q207309}} Hatta-chō Moritoki 41 |位置 = {{Coord|33|59|22.8|N|134|30|53.1|E|region:JP-36_type:landmark_scale:25000|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Uganomori no Kami |社格 = {{ill|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|Q134917287|WD=Q134917287}}・former {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}} |創建 = unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = October 2 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=宇母理
比古神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Umorihiko Shrine''' (うもりひこじんじゃ) is a shrine located in {{ill|lt=Hatta-chō|Q11390732|WD=Q11390732}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima|Q207309|WD=Q207309}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|WD=Q160734}}. === Enshrined deity === * '''Uganomori no Kami''' - also said to be another name for {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ugayafukiaezu no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}. === History === The founding date is unknown. It is an {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Engishiki shrine|1=UNKNOWN|WD=Q134917286|lt=Shikinaisha}}. This old shrine was also called "Umori Daimyōjin" and "Moritoki Daimyōjin." Flooding of the nearby {{ill|lt=Hatta River (Tokushima Prefecture)|Q11390730|WD=Q11390730|lt=Hatta River}} caused the loss of the shrine buildings and old documents. In 1875 (Meiji 8), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284}}. === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:うもりひこしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Umorihiko Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Umorihiko Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:徳島市の神社]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:徳島県の旧村社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

link|Q11449442}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記| date = 2025年1月}}{{神社 |名称 = Umorihiko Shrine |画像 = [[File:Umorihiko shrine, Tokushima.jpg|250px|Umorihiko Shrine]] |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|WD=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Tokushima|Q207309|WD=Q207309|1=Tokushima (city)}} Hatta-chō Moritoki 41 |位置 = {{Coord|33|59|22.8|N|134|30|53.1|E|region:JP-36_type:landmark_scale:25000|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Uganomori no Kami |社格 = {{ill|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|Q134917287|WD=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}・former {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |創建 = unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = October 2 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=宇母理
比古神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Umorihiko Shrine''' (うもりひこじんじゃ) is a shrine located in {{ill|lt=Hatta-chō|Q11390732|WD=Q11390732|1=Hata, Tokushima}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima|Q207309|WD=Q207309|1=Tokushima (city)}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|WD=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}. === Enshrined deity === * '''Uganomori no Kami''' - also said to be another name for {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ugayafukiaezu no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}. === History === The founding date is unknown. It is an {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Engishiki shrine|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286|lt=Shikinaisha}}. This old shrine was also called "Umori Daimyōjin" and "Moritoki Daimyōjin." Flooding of the nearby {{ill|lt=Hatta River (Tokushima Prefecture)|Q11390730|WD=Q11390730|lt=Hatta River|1=Hata River}} caused the loss of the shrine buildings and old documents. In 1875 (Meiji 8), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:うもりひこしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Umorihiko Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Umorihiko Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:徳島市の神社]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:徳島県の旧村社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

{{Coord|33|59|22.8|N|134|30|53.1|E|region:JP-36_type:landmark_scale:25000|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Uganomori no Kami |社格 = {{ill|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|Q134917287|WD=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}・former {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |創建 = unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = October 2 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=宇母理
比古神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Umorihiko Shrine''' (うもりひこじんじゃ) is a shrine located in {{ill|lt=Hatta-chō|Q11390732|WD=Q11390732|1=Hata, Tokushima}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima|Q207309|WD=Q207309|1=Tokushima (city)}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|WD=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}. === Enshrined deity === * '''Uganomori no Kami''' - also said to be another name for {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ugayafukiaezu no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}. === History === The founding date is unknown. It is an {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Engishiki shrine|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286|lt=Shikinaisha}}. This old shrine was also called "Umori Daimyōjin" and "Moritoki Daimyōjin." Flooding of the nearby {{ill|lt=Hatta River (Tokushima Prefecture)|Q11390730|WD=Q11390730|lt=Hatta River|1=Hata River}} caused the loss of the shrine buildings and old documents. In 1875 (Meiji 8), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:うもりひこしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Umorihiko Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Umorihiko Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:徳島市の神社]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:徳島県の旧村社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqq]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

比古神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Umorihiko Shrine''' (うもりひこじんじゃ) is a shrine located in {{ill|lt=Hatta-chō|Q11390732|WD=Q11390732|1=Hata, Tokushima}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima|Q207309|WD=Q207309|1=Tokushima (city)}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|WD=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}. === Enshrined deity === * '''Uganomori no Kami''' - also said to be another name for {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ugayafukiaezu no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}. === History === The founding date is unknown. It is an {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Engishiki shrine|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286|lt=Shikinaisha}}. This old shrine was also called "Umori Daimyōjin" and "Moritoki Daimyōjin." Flooding of the nearby {{ill|lt=Hatta River (Tokushima Prefecture)|Q11390730|WD=Q11390730|lt=Hatta River|1=Hata River}} caused the loss of the shrine buildings and old documents. In 1875 (Meiji 8), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} {{DEFAULTSORT:うもりひこしんしや}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Umorihiko Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Umorihiko Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:徳島市の神社]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:徳島県の旧村社]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qqqqqqq]]

== name in kana (P1814) == * うもりひこじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 3480005000911 == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '徳島県徳島市八多町森時41', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:宇母理比古神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11449442}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記| date = 2025年1月}}{{神社 |名称 = Umorihiko Shrine |画像 = [[File:Umorihiko shrine, Tokushima.jpg|250px|Umorihiko Shrine]] |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|WD=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Tokushima|Q207309|WD=Q207309|1=Tokushima (city)}} Hatta-chō Moritoki 41 |位置 = {{Coord|33|59|22.8|N|134|30|53.1|E|region:JP-36_type:landmark_scale:25000|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Uganomori no Kami |社格 = {{ill|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|Q134917287|WD=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}・former {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |創建 = unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = October 2 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=宇母理
比古神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Umorihiko Shrine''' (うもりひこじんじゃ) is a shrine located in {{ill|lt=Hatta-chō|Q11390732|WD=Q11390732|1=Hata, Tokushima}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima|Q207309|WD=Q207309|1=Tokushima (city)}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|WD=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}. === Enshrined deity === * '''Uganomori no Kami''' - also said to be another name for {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ugayafukiaezu no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}. === History === The founding date is unknown. It is an {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Engishiki shrine|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286|lt=Shikinaisha}}. This old shrine was also called "Umori Daimyōjin" and "Moritoki Daimyōjin." Flooding of the nearby {{ill|lt=Hatta River (Tokushima Prefecture)|Q11390730|WD=Q11390730|lt=Hatta River|1=Hata River}} caused the loss of the shrine buildings and old documents. In 1875 (Meiji 8), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Umorihiko Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Umorihiko Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:徳島市の神社]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:徳島県の旧村社]][[Category:qqqqqqq]]

link|Q11449442}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記| date = 2025年1月}}{{神社 |名称 = Umorihiko Shrine |画像 = [[File:Umorihiko shrine, Tokushima.jpg|250px|Umorihiko Shrine]] |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|WD=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Tokushima|Q207309|WD=Q207309|1=Tokushima (city)}} Hatta-chō Moritoki 41 |位置 = {{Coord|33|59|22.8|N|134|30|53.1|E|region:JP-36_type:landmark_scale:25000|display=inline,title}} |祭神 = Uganomori no Kami |社格 = {{ill|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|Q134917287|WD=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}・former {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |創建 = unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = October 2 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=宇母理
比古神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Umorihiko Shrine''' (うもりひこじんじゃ) is a shrine located in {{ill|lt=Hatta-chō|Q11390732|WD=Q11390732|1=Hata, Tokushima}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima|Q207309|WD=Q207309|1=Tokushima (city)}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|WD=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}. === Enshrined deity === * '''Uganomori no Kami''' - also said to be another name for {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ugayafukiaezu no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}. === History === The founding date is unknown. It is an {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Engishiki shrine|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286|lt=Shikinaisha}}. This old shrine was also called "Umori Daimyōjin" and "Moritoki Daimyōjin." Flooding of the nearby {{ill|lt=Hatta River (Tokushima Prefecture)|Q11390730|WD=Q11390730|lt=Hatta River|1=Hata River}} caused the loss of the shrine buildings and old documents. In 1875 (Meiji 8), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Umorihiko Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Umorihiko Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Tokushima, Tokushima]] [[Category:阿波国の式内社]] [[Category:徳島県の旧村社]][[Category:qqqqqqq]]

Shosha}}・former {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} |創建 = unknown |本殿 = |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = October 2 |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=宇母理
比古神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} '''Umorihiko Shrine''' (うもりひこじんじゃ) is a shrine located in {{ill|lt=Hatta-chō|Q11390732|WD=Q11390732|1=Hata, Tokushima}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima|Q207309|WD=Q207309|1=Tokushima (city)}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|WD=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}. === Enshrined deity === * '''Uganomori no Kami''' - also said to be another name for {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Ugayafukiaezu no Mikoto|1=UNKNOWN}}. === History === The founding date is unknown. It is an {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Engishiki shrine|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286|lt=Shikinaisha}}. This old shrine was also called "Umori Daimyōjin" and "Moritoki Daimyōjin." Flooding of the nearby {{ill|lt=Hatta River (Tokushima Prefecture)|Q11390730|WD=Q11390730|lt=Hatta River|1=Hata River}} caused the loss of the shrine buildings and old documents. In 1875 (Meiji 8), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Umorihiko Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Umorihiko Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Tokushima, Tokushima]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:徳島県の旧村社]][[Category:qqqqqqq]]

It is an {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Engishiki shrine|1=Shikinaisha|WD=Q134917286|lt=Shikinaisha}}. This old shrine was also called "Umori Daimyōjin" and "Moritoki Daimyōjin." Flooding of the nearby {{ill|lt=Hatta River (Tokushima Prefecture)|Q11390730|WD=Q11390730|lt=Hatta River|1=Hata River}} caused the loss of the shrine buildings and old documents. In 1875 (Meiji 8), it was ranked as a {{ill|lt=village shrine|Q134917284|WD=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}. === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Umorihiko Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Umorihiko Shrine]][[Category:pages]][[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrine]] [[Category:Shikinai Shōsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:pages]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Tokushima, Tokushima]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:徳島県の旧村社]]
